description: This file implements a service for exploring and searching roles based on personas, including fuzzy matching of skills, scoring, and integration with external repositories and a bedrock search engine.

methods.name: _normStr(v)
methods.description: Normalizes a string by trimming, handling nulls, and converting to string.

methods.name: _normalizeForFuzzyMatch(s)
methods.description: Converts strings to lowercase and removes non-alphanumeric characters to facilitate fuzzy matching.

methods.name: _safeSlice(arr, n)
methods.description: Safely slices an array up to a specified number, returning an empty array if input is not an array.

methods.name: _loadFinalPersonaEnvelope(personaId)
methods.description: Fetches the final persona envelope from the personas repository using personaId.

methods.name: _extractValidatedSkillNames(finalPersonaObj)
methods.description: Extracts and normalizes validated skill names from a final persona object.

methods.name: _decorateAndScoreRoles({ roles, scoringUserSkills })
methods.description: Decorates role objects with scoring information, performs fuzzy matching of user skills against role requirements, and sorts roles by compatibility score.

methods.name: exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven({ q, limit = 30, personaId = null } = {})
methods.description: Main function to explore roles based on persona-driven search query, applying cache, external bedrock search, and scoring logic, returning a limited list of roles.

ctags.name: exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven
ctags.pattern: /^async function exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven({ q, limit = 30, personaId = null } = {}) {$/
